headline: Nominal Introduces Agentic Performance Management -- The Cursor Moment for Accounting
summary: Nominal, the AI company that has saved finance teams more than 50,000 hours of manual accounting work, today announces a comprehensive rebrand — one that marks the company's formal declaration of a new software category: Agentic Performance Management (APM), the modern standard for finance operations.

headline: NetApp, Inc. (NTAP) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
summary: NetApp (NTAP) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.

headline: CrowdStrike To Rally Around 7%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
summary: Wall Street analysts changed outlook on top names. Goldman Sachs raised PSX target, BTIG cut DRVN target, Morgan Stanley cut NWL target, B of A raised TK target, Stifel raised PANW target, Mizuho cut HD target, Goldman Sachs raised ENPH target, B of A raised NTAP target.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Neutral on NetApp, Raises Price Target to $125
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Wamsi Mohan   maintains NetApp (NASDAQ:NTAP) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $118 to $125.
